arts.ttl: Ange sounds Tottenham wake up call as Rangers ghost haunts Aussie in damning Fulham defeat
arts.sum: The former Celtic boss was left disappointed as his side suffered a 2-1 defeat at Craven Cottage to continue their underwhelming campaign

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou aims subtle dig at Tottenham players after Fulham controversy
arts.sum: Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou endured another frustrating afternoon on Sunday as his side failed to score in a 2-0 defeat at the hands of Fulham in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Insipid Tottenham defeat highlights Europa League problem
arts.sum: Spurs will struggle to reverse the bad vibes for Eintracht Frankfurt tie if they continue to play like they did against Fulham

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou just broke a promise he made to Tottenham players in December after 2-0 loss at Fulham

arts.sum: “It’s a disappointing loss,” Ange told us afterwards. I thought that was better in the second half.

arts.ttl: Hapless Spurs suffer again as Sessegnon has Fulham dreaming of European place
arts.sum: It feels like there might be a lot of this between now and the end of the season. The title and relegation are effectively resolved, which means all that remains is the squabble over European qualification with nine teams in the mix for (probably) six places. The result was a strange, threequarter-pace game. It would be unfair to say both sides were going through the motions but, equally, this wasn’t the most intense game you’ll ever see. It had seemed a phenomenon many thought impossible: a game even Angeball couldn’t make interesting. Tottenham’s defending, though, can conjure goals from anything. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: What Mathys Tel had to endure after Fulham 2-0 Tottenham might not make him want to stay at Spurs

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel Confronts Tottenham Fans in Away End After Fulham
arts.sum: Tottenham lost yet again in the Premier League and fans haven't taken kindly to their shambolic domestic form

arts.ttl: Fulham 2-0 Tottenham Hotspur: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Muniz, Sessegnon sink Ange Postecoglou's stranded Spurs
arts.sum: Marco Silva's Fulham left it late to beat Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham Hotspur at Craven Cottage in the Premier League on Sunday.
